title: Xtra Fresh Australian Fish Poke
description: A fresh and tender Australian dish featuring chopped chives and raw friendly ingredients, this poke is a nostalgic treat for anyone who loves seafood. It is made with sustainable and locally sourced ingredients.
instructions: Cut the tuna into small cubes and place them in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
Pour the dressing over the tuna and toss to coat.
Sprinkle chopped chives, salt, and black pepper over the tuna and toss again.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the top of the poke.
Serve the poke in small bowls or glasses and garnish with additional chopped chives if desired.
